title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrates using Softr AI Co-Builder to construct a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, workflows, and automations from minimal prompting. The video compares Softr with alternatives like Lovable and Replit, highlighting cost efficiency and reduced need for re-prompting during development.
